purpose: Pre-H100 ROI bundle: cert_graph idempotency fix + 5 NO_SELFTEST minimal selftest additions + dist/native daily cron + secret_scanner pre-commit doc. Captures the regression-window evidence so a follow-up reviewer can verify nothing previously-green broke.

tasks.title: cert_graph_gen idempotency drift fix
tasks.drift_root_cause: selftest's do_generate() wrote g.md+g.json INTO the same temp cert_dir. The 2nd build's _list_jsons(cert_dir) then re-scanned g.json as a 3rd 'cert' artifact (nodes 2 -> 3, edges stable), changing both md and json hashes. _hash_no_ts grep filter was correct; the bug was directory layout.
tasks.fix: selftest now writes outputs to a sibling 'out/' subdir (mkdir -p $TMP/out, md=$TMP/out/g.md, js=$TMP/out/g.json) so cert_dir scan stays stable across runs.
tasks.after_verdict: S2 PASS: idempotent (md+json) — SELFTEST PASS overall
tasks.manual_grep_test: PASS (was already PASS — confirms _hash_no_ts grep filter logic is correct)

tasks.title: dist/ native build daily cron wrapper + plist
tasks.selftest_verdict: PASS (S1 sh_quote, S2 opt default, S3 build script present, S4 dry-run jsonl write)

tasks.title: adversarial_bench daily cron — activation guidance
tasks.note_on_daily: plist ships at every-6h; flip to every-24h by editing StartInterval to 86400 if the user wants strictly daily. No file edits performed in this batch — plist is verbatim from prior commit (D24).
tasks.agent_constraint_acknowledged: agent did NOT run launchctl load.

tasks.title: secret_scanner pre-commit hook — manual install guide
covers: what the hook does (HIGH/CRITICAL block, MEDIUM warn, clean pass)
tasks.agent_constraint_acknowledged: agent did NOT touch .git/hooks/, did NOT create tool/git_hooks/pre_commit_secret_scanner.bash.

no_selftest_minimal_additions.selection_criteria: low-blast-radius bash tools with existing arg parsers; --selftest stub adds parse-clean (bash -n) + 1 invariant; NEVER triggers --apply path / network / launchctl / dist rewrite.

tools_added.invariant: every plist in PLISTS exists under config/launchd/
APPLY=0 default + policy file present (or graceful SKIP if missing)

regression_window.backward_compat_strategy: all 5 bash tools added --selftest as a NEW arg path; existing arg cases unchanged. cert_graph_gen selftest fix isolated to test fixture layout — production do_generate() unchanged. dist_native_build_periodic.hexa is brand-new, no existing caller.

exit_criteria_met: T2: build_fixup_native.bash --selftest stays 2/2 PASS; new wrapper --selftest 4/4 PASS
T3: adversarial_bench_periodic.plist already present; activation guide referenced
NO_SELFTEST: 5 minimal selftests all exit 0; 35 candidates remain for follow-up
Hard constraints: .roadmap untouched, no auto-launchctl, no auto-hook-install, no commits, 0 .py files
